conflictBlocks.oursContent: note="Requires All-access • Not included in trial"

// Clarify what the trial covers (concierge is a separate add-on).
    return `All-access trial: ${trialDaysLeft} ${dayLabel} left`;

preservedBehaviors.description: ai-concierge tab has addon: 'concierge' property marking it as a paid add-on
MainHeader trial chip text includes 'All-access trial' prefix to clarify scope
Pricing page concierge add-on note mentions 'Not included in trial'
Pricing page concierge card note mentions 'White-glove' support
tradeShowTabs includes all 14 tabs: overview, tasks, leads, travel, schedule, inventory, shipping, budget, team, vendors, roi, reports, ai-concierge, chat
Pricing page has three plan cards: All-access $99/month, Annual $999/year, Concierge $299/month
MainHeader shows trial chip when trialDaysLeft <= 3 and billing chip when plan selection needed
